channel.title: Bsa on Blank Schematic
channel.description: Recent content in Bsa on Blank Schematic

item.title: Open Source Pinewood Derby Track
item.description: A fully open source, 38-foot, 4-lane pinewood derby timing system built for Lansing Makers Network — Arduino Mega, custom PCB, IR sensors, solenoid starting gate, and 7-segment displays.
